sentences.sentence: A considerable amount of research since the mid 1980s has been concerned with what has been termed children's theory of mind.
sentences.translation: 自上世纪八十年代中期以来，大量研究都关注于所谓的儿童“心理理论”。

structure.text: A considerable amount of research since the mid 1980s
has been concerned with
what has been termed children's theory of mind

difficult_points: since the mid 1980s 是时间状语，修饰 research，说明这类研究开始的时间。
what has been termed 是被动语态的名词性从句，作 concerned with 的宾语，意为“被称作……的东西”。

sentences.sentence: This involves children's ability to understand that people can have different beliefs and representations of the world– a capacity that is shown by four years of age.
sentences.translation: 这涉及儿童理解他人可以持有不同信念和世界表征的能力——这是一种到四岁时就已表现出来的能力。

structure.text: This
involves children's ability to understand that people can have different beliefs and representations of the world
that people can have different beliefs and representations of the world
a capacity that is shown by four years of age
that is shown by four years of age

difficult_points: This 指代前一句提到的 children's theory of mind。
that 引导宾语从句，修饰 understand 的内容。
a capacity... 是对前面 ability to understand... 的同位语说明，capacity 后接定语从句 that is shown by four years of age。

sentences.sentence: Furthermore, this ability appears to be absent in children with autism.
sentences.translation: 此外，这种能力在患有自闭症的儿童身上似乎是缺失的。

structure.text: this ability
appears to be absent in children with autism

difficult_points: appear to be 表示“似乎是”，是对观察结果的委婉表述。
with autism 是介词短语，修饰 children，指患有自闭症的儿童。

sentences.sentence: The ability to work out that another person is thinking is clearly an important aspect of both cognitive and social development.
sentences.translation: 能够推断出他人正在思考这一能力，显然是认知发展和社会性发展共同的重要方面。

structure.text: The ability to work out that another person is thinking
to work out that another person is thinking
that another person is thinking
is clearly an important aspect of both cognitive and social development

difficult_points: to work out 是不定式修饰 ability，说明这种能力具体指什么。
that 引导宾语从句，作 work out 的宾语。
both cognitive and social development 强调这一能力同时影响认知和社会两方面的发展。

sentences.sentence: Furthermore, one important explanation for autism is that children suffering from this condition do not have a theory of mind(TOM).
sentences.translation: 此外，关于自闭症的一种重要解释认为，患有这种病症的儿童并不具备心理理论（TOM）。

structure.text: one important explanation for autism
is
that children suffering from this condition do not have a theory of mind(TOM)
suffering from this condition

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，说明这一解释的具体内容。
suffering from this condition 是现在分词短语，修饰 children，指患有自闭症的儿童。
mind(TOM) 之间缺失空格是原文排版问题，TOM 是 theory of mind 的缩写。

sentences.sentence: Consequently, the development of children's TOM has attracted considerable attention.
sentences.translation: 因此，儿童心理理论的发展一直备受关注。

structure.text: the development of children's TOM
has attracted considerable attention

difficult_points: Consequently 表示结果，承接上文关于自闭症与心理理论关系的论述。
attract considerable attention 表示“引起相当大的关注”。

sentences.sentence: Wimmer and Perner devised a 'false belief task' to address this question.
sentences.translation: 维默和佩尔纳设计了一个“错误信念任务”，以探讨这一问题。

structure.text: Wimmer and Perner
devised a 'false belief task'
to address this question

difficult_points: to address this question 是不定式作目的状语，说明设计这一任务的目的。
this question 指代上文提出的儿童是否具备心理理论这一问题。

sentences.sentence: They used some toys to act out the following story.
sentences.translation: 他们用一些玩具表演了下面这个故事。

structure.text: They
used some toys
to act out the following story

difficult_points: to act out 是不定式作目的状语，表示用玩具表演出下面这个故事。
the following story 提示读者接下来的几句话都是这个故事的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: Maxi left some chocolate in a blue cupboard before he went out.
sentences.translation: 马克西在出门之前把一些巧克力放在了蓝色的柜子里。

structure.text: Maxi
left some chocolate in a blue cupboard
before he went out

difficult_points: before 引导时间状语从句，说明放巧克力发生在马克西外出之前。
some chocolate 是不可数名词短语，指“一些巧克力”，而非具体数量。

sentences.sentence: When he was away his mother moved the chocolate to a green cupboard.
sentences.translation: 在他外出期间，他的妈妈把巧克力移到了绿色的柜子里。

structure.text: When he was away
his mother
moved the chocolate to a green cupboard

difficult_points: When 引导时间状语从句，说明妈妈移动巧克力发生在马克西不在家的时候。
his mother 中的 his 指代马克西，说明是马克西的妈妈而非泛指某人的母亲。

sentences.sentence: Children were asked to predict where Maxi will look for his chocolate when he returns.
sentences.translation: 研究让儿童预测马克西回来后会去哪里找他的巧克力。

structure.text: Children
were asked to predict
where Maxi will look for his chocolate
when he returns

difficult_points: were asked to predict 是被动语态，儿童是被要求预测的对象。
where 引导宾语从句，作 predict 的宾语。
will 在此表示故事情境中马克西回来后的将来动作，而非说话时的将来。

sentences.sentence: Most children under four years gave the incorrect answer, that Maxi will look in the green cupboard.
sentences.translation: 大多数四岁以下的儿童给出了错误答案，认为马克西会去绿色柜子里找。

structure.text: Most children under four years
gave the incorrect answer
that Maxi will look in the green cupboard

difficult_points: under four years 修饰 children，指四岁以下的儿童。
that 引导同位语从句，具体说明 the incorrect answer 的内容。

sentences.sentence: Those over four years tended to give the correct answer, that Maxi will look in the blue cupboard.
sentences.translation: 四岁以上的儿童则倾向于给出正确答案，认为马克西会去蓝色柜子里找。

structure.text: Those over four years
tended to give the correct answer
that Maxi will look in the blue cupboard

difficult_points: Those over four years 指代四岁以上的儿童，Those 代替 children。
tend to do 表示“倾向于做某事”，反映这是一种较普遍的趋势而非绝对。

sentences.sentence: The incorrect answers indicated that the younger children did not understand that Maxi's beliefs and representations no longer matched the actual state of the world, and they failed to appreciate that Maxi will act on the basis of his beliefs rather than the way that the world is actually organised.
sentences.translation: 这些错误答案表明，较年幼的儿童并不理解马克西的信念和表征已经不再与世界的实际状态相符，他们也未能意识到马克西会依据自己的信念行事，而不是依据世界实际运作的方式。

structure.text: The incorrect answers
indicated
that the younger children did not understand that Maxi's beliefs and representations no longer matched the actual state of the world
that Maxi's beliefs and representations no longer matched the actual state of the world
and they failed to appreciate that Maxi will act on the basis of his beliefs rather than the way that the world is actually organised
that Maxi will act on the basis of his beliefs rather than the way that the world is actually organised

difficult_points: 第一个 that 引导宾语从句，作 indicated 的宾语；从句内部又嵌套了第二个 that 引导的宾语从句。
rather than 连接两种对立的行为依据：基于自己的信念，还是基于世界实际的样子。
that the world is actually organised 是修饰 the way 的定语从句。

sentences.sentence: A simpler version of the Maxi task was devised by Baron-Cohen to take account of criticisms that younger children may have been affected by the complexity and too much information of the story in the task described above.
sentences.translation: 巴伦-科恩设计了一个更简单版本的马克西任务，以回应有关上述任务中故事过于复杂、信息量过大可能影响年幼儿童表现的批评。

structure.text: A simpler version of the Maxi task
was devised by Baron-Cohen
to take account of criticisms
that younger children may have been affected by the complexity and too much information of the story in the task described above
described above

difficult_points: to take account of 是不定式作目的状语，说明设计更简单版本的原因。
that 引导同位语从句，说明 criticisms 具体的内容。
described above 是过去分词短语，修饰 the task，指前文所描述的那个任务。

sentences.sentence: For example, the child is shown two dolls, Sally and Anne, who have a basket and a box, respectively.
sentences.translation: 例如，儿童会看到两个玩偶——莎莉和安妮，她们分别拥有一个篮子和一个盒子。

structure.text: the child
is shown two dolls
Sally and Anne
who have a basket and a box, respectively

difficult_points: is shown 是双宾语被动结构，相当于 someone shows the child two dolls。
respectively 表示分别对应，Sally 对应 basket，Anne 对应 box。

sentences.sentence: Sally also has a marble, which she places in her basket, and then leaves to take a walk.
sentences.translation: 莎莉还有一颗弹珠，她把弹珠放进自己的篮子里，然后出去散步了。

structure.text: Sally
also has a marble
which she places in her basket
and then leaves to take a walk

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 a marble。
leaves to take a walk 与 has 并列，共用主语 Sally。

sentences.sentence: While she is out of the room, Anne takes the marble from the basket, eventually putting it in the box.
sentences.translation: 在她离开房间期间，安妮把弹珠从篮子里拿走，最终放进了盒子里。

structure.text: While she is out of the room
Anne
takes the marble from the basket
eventually putting it in the box

difficult_points: While 引导时间状语从句，表示与主句动作同时发生。
putting it in the box 是现在分词短语作伴随状语，说明拿走弹珠后的后续动作。

sentences.sentence: Sally returns, and child is then asked where Sally will look for the marble.
sentences.translation: 莎莉回来了，随后儿童被问及莎莉会去哪里找那颗弹珠。

structure.text: Sally returns
and child is then asked where Sally will look for the marble
where Sally will look for the marble

difficult_points: is asked 是被动语态，child 是被提问的对象。
where 引导宾语从句，作 asked 的（逻辑）宾语。

sentences.sentence: The child passes the task if she answers that Sally will look in the basket, where she put the marble; the child fails the task if she answers that Sally will look in the box, where the child knows the marble is hidden, even though Sally cannot know, since she did not see it hidden there.
sentences.translation: 如果儿童回答莎莉会去篮子里找——也就是她放弹珠的地方，就算通过测试；如果儿童回答莎莉会去盒子里找——也就是儿童自己知道弹珠被藏起来的地方，尽管莎莉不可能知道这一点，因为她并没有看到弹珠被藏在那里，就算未通过测试。

structure.text: The child passes the task
if she answers that Sally will look in the basket, where she put the marble
that Sally will look in the basket
where she put the marble
the child fails the task
if she answers that Sally will look in the box, where the child knows the marble is hidden, even though Sally cannot know, since she did not see it hidden there
even though Sally cannot know
since she did not see it hidden there

difficult_points: 分号连接两个结构对称的条件句，分别说明“通过测试”和“未通过测试”的判断标准。
where 引导定语从句，分别修饰 the basket 和 the box，补充说明地点。
even though 与 since 两个从句都用来解释安妮不可能知道真相的原因。

sentences.sentence: In order to pass the task, the child must be able to understand that another's mental representation of the situation is different from their own, and the child must be able to predict behavior based on that understanding.
sentences.translation: 为了通过这项测试，儿童必须能够理解他人对情境的心理表征与自己的不同，并且必须能够依据这种理解来预测他人的行为。

structure.text: In order to pass the task
the child must be able to understand that another's mental representation of the situation is different from their own
that another's mental representation of the situation is different from their own
and the child must be able to predict behavior based on that understanding
based on that understanding

difficult_points: In order to 引导目的状语，说明通过测试需要具备的能力。
another's 是 another person's 的缩略形式，指他人的心理表征。
based on 是过去分词短语作状语，说明预测行为的依据。

sentences.sentence: The results of research using false-belief tasks have been fairly consistent: most normally-developing children are unable to pass the tasks until around age four.
sentences.translation: 使用错误信念任务开展的研究结果相当一致：发育正常的儿童大多要到四岁左右才能通过这类测试。

structure.text: The results of research using false-belief tasks
have been fairly consistent
most normally-developing children are unable to pass the tasks until around age four

difficult_points: using false-belief tasks 是现在分词短语，修饰 research，说明研究采用的方法。
冒号后的内容具体说明研究结果“相当一致”体现在哪里。
until 表示“直到……为止”，说明大多数儿童在四岁前都无法通过测试。

sentences.sentence: Leslie argues that, before 18 months, children treat the world in a literal way and rarely demonstrate pretence.
sentences.translation: 莱斯利认为，在18个月大之前，儿童以字面的方式对待世界，很少表现出假装行为。

structure.text: Leslie
argues
that, before 18 months, children treat the world in a literal way and rarely demonstrate pretence
before 18 months

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，作 argues 的宾语。
treat...and...demonstrate 是并列谓语，共用主语 children。

sentences.sentence: He also argues that it is necessary for the cognitive system to distinguish between what is pretend and what is real.
sentences.translation: 他还认为，认知系统有必要区分什么是假装的、什么是真实的。

structure.text: He
also argues
that it is necessary for the cognitive system to distinguish between what is pretend and what is real
for the cognitive system to distinguish between what is pretend and what is real

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，真正的主语是 for the cognitive system to distinguish...。
between what is pretend and what is real 中两个 what 引导的从句作 distinguish between 的宾语。

expressions.text: it is necessary for sb to do

sentences.sentence: If children were not able to do this, they would not be able to distinguish between imagination and reality.
sentences.translation: 如果儿童不具备这种能力，他们就无法区分想象和现实。

structure.text: If children were not able to do this
they would not be able to distinguish between imagination and reality

difficult_points: If...were...would... 是虚拟语气，表示与事实相反的假设。
this 指代前一句提到的区分假装与真实的能力。

sentences.sentence: Leslie suggested that this pretend play becomes possible because of the presence of a de-coupler that copies primary representations to secondary representations.
sentences.translation: 莱斯利提出，这种假装游戏之所以可能，是因为存在一种“解耦器”，它能把主要表征复制为次要表征。

structure.text: Leslie
suggested
that this pretend play becomes possible because of the presence of a de-coupler
that copies primary representations to secondary representations

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，作 suggested 的宾语。
that copies... 是定语从句，修饰 a de-coupler，说明这一装置的作用。
de-coupler 是作者自造的术语，指“解耦器”，能把主要表征复制为次要表征。

sentences.sentence: For example, children, when pretending a banana is a telephone, would make a secondary representation of a banana.
sentences.translation: 例如，儿童在假装香蕉是电话时，会为香蕉建立一个次要表征。

structure.text: children
when pretending a banana is a telephone
would make a secondary representation of a banana

difficult_points: when pretending... 是省略主语的伴随状语，补充说明假装行为发生的情境。
pretending a banana is a telephone 中 pretend 后直接接从句，省略了 that。

sentences.sentence: They would manipulate this representation and they would use their stored knowledge of 'telephone' to build on this pretence.
sentences.translation: 他们会操作这个表征，并运用自己已有的关于“电话”的知识来进一步发展这一假装行为。

structure.text: They would manipulate this representation
and they would use their stored knowledge of 'telephone'
to build on this pretence

difficult_points: this representation 指代上一句提到的“香蕉的次要表征”。
to build on 是不定式作目的状语，说明运用已有知识的目的。

sentences.sentence: There is also evidence that social processes play a part in the development of TOM.
sentences.translation: 也有证据表明，社会性过程在心理理论的发展中发挥着作用。

structure.text: There is also evidence
that social processes play a part in the development of TOM

difficult_points: There is evidence that... 是常见的存在句结构，that 引导同位语从句说明证据的内容。
also 承接上文关于个体差异等因素的讨论，引出另一类影响心理理论发展的证据。

sentences.sentence: Meins and her colleagues have found that what they term mind mindedness in maternal speech to six-month old infants is related to both security of attachment and to TOM abilities.
sentences.translation: 梅因斯及其同事发现，他们所称的针对六个月大婴儿的母亲言语中的“心理关注”，既与依恋安全感相关，也与心理理论能力相关。

structure.text: Meins and her colleagues
have found
that what they term mind mindedness in maternal speech to six-month old infants is related to both security of attachment and to TOM abilities
what they term mind mindedness in maternal speech to six-month old infants
is related to both security of attachment and to TOM abilities

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，其内部主语又是 what 引导的从句，结构上是从句套从句。
term A B 意为“把A称为B”，what they term mind mindedness 相当于 the thing they call mind mindedness。
both...and... 连接 security of attachment 和 TOM abilities 两个并列宾语。

sentences.sentence: Mind Mindedness involves speech that discusses infants' feelings and explains their behaviour in terms of mental stages(e.g_ 'you1 re feeling hungry')
sentences.translation: “心理关注”指的是那种谈论婴儿感受、并从心理状态角度解释其行为的言语（例如“你饿了”）。

structure.text: Mind Mindedness
involves speech
that discusses infants' feelings and explains their behaviour in terms of mental stages
(e.g_ 'you1 re feeling hungry')

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句，修饰 speech，discusses 和 explains 是其中并列的谓语。
in terms of 表示“从……角度；用……来说”。
e.g_ 和 you1 re 是原文排版错误，分别对应 e.g. 和 you're，此处按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: Lewis investigated older children living in extended families in Crete and Cyprus.
sentences.translation: 刘易斯调查了生活在克里特岛和塞浦路斯大家庭中的年龄较大的儿童。

structure.text: Lewis
investigated older children
living in extended families in Crete and Cyprus

difficult_points: living in extended families in Crete and Cyprus 是现在分词短语，修饰 older children，说明调查对象的居住环境。
older children 与前文测试的低龄儿童相对，暗示研究对象年龄段的变化。

sentences.sentence: They found that children who socially interact with more adults, who have more friends. And who have more older siblings tend to pass TOM tasks at a slightly earlier age than other children.
sentences.translation: 他们发现，与更多成年人有社交互动、拥有更多朋友、有更多年长兄姐的儿童，往往能比其他儿童更早一点通过心理理论测试。

structure.text: They
found
that children who socially interact with more adults, who have more friends. And who have more older siblings tend to pass TOM tasks at a slightly earlier age than other children
who socially interact with more adults
who have more friends
who have more older siblings
tend to pass TOM tasks at a slightly earlier age than other children

difficult_points: found 后的 that 从句中多出的句号（friends. And）是原文排版错误，应连读为三个并列的 who 定语从句。
三个 who 引导的定语从句并列修饰 children，分别描述其社交互动、朋友数量和兄姐数量。
tend to do 表示“倾向于”，说明这是相对提前而非绝对提前。

sentences.sentence: Furthermore, because young children are more likely to talk about their thoughts and feelings with peers than with their mothers, peer interaction may provide a special impetus to the development of a TOM.
sentences.translation: 此外，由于幼儿更倾向于和同伴而非母亲谈论自己的想法和感受，同伴互动可能为心理理论的发展提供了特殊的推动力。

structure.text: because young children are more likely to talk about their thoughts and feelings with peers than with their mothers
peer interaction
may provide a special impetus to the development of a TOM

difficult_points: because 引导原因状语从句，解释同伴互动为何对心理理论发展有特殊推动作用。
more likely...than... 比较的是与同伴交流和与母亲交流这两种情形的可能性。

sentences.sentence: A similar point has been made by Dunn, who argues that peer interaction is more likely to contain pretend play and that it is likely to be more challenging because other children, unlike adults, do not make large adaptations to the communicative needs of other children.
sentences.translation: 邓恩也提出过类似的观点，她认为同伴互动更可能包含假装游戏，而且这种互动更具挑战性，因为其他儿童不像成年人那样会对同伴的交流需求做出很大的迁就。

structure.text: A similar point has been made by Dunn
who argues that peer interaction is more likely to contain pretend play and that it is likely to be more challenging
that peer interaction is more likely to contain pretend play
and that it is likely to be more challenging
because other children, unlike adults, do not make large adaptations to the communicative needs of other children

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句，修饰 Dunn，argues 后两个 that 从句并列作其宾语。
unlike adults 是插入的对比状语，强调其他儿童与成人的不同之处。
make adaptations to 表示“对……做出调整”，此处指迁就同伴交流需求。

sentences.sentence: In addition, there has been concern that some aspects of the TOM approach underestimate children's understanding of other people.
sentences.translation: 此外，也有人担心心理理论研究方法的某些方面低估了儿童对他人的理解能力。

structure.text: there has been concern
that some aspects of the TOM approach underestimate children's understanding of other people

difficult_points: there has been concern that... 是存在句结构，that 引导同位语从句说明担忧的具体内容。
In addition 承接上文的社会因素论述，引出对 TOM 研究方法本身的另一种质疑。

sentences.sentence: After all, infants will point to objects apparently in an effort to change a person's direction of gaze and interest; they can interact quite effectively with other people; they will express their ideas in opposition to the wishes of others; and they will show empathy for the feeling of others.
sentences.translation: 毕竟，婴儿会指向物体，显然是想改变他人注视和关注的方向；他们能够相当有效地与他人互动；他们会表达出与他人意愿相左的想法；他们也会对他人的感受表现出同情。

structure.text: infants will point to objects apparently in an effort to change a person's direction of gaze and interest
in an effort to change a person's direction of gaze and interest
they can interact quite effectively with other people
they will express their ideas in opposition to the wishes of others
and they will show empathy for the feeling of others

difficult_points: After all 表示“毕竟、说到底”，引出反驳前文低估儿童能力这一观点的证据。
分号连接四个并列分句，逐一列举婴幼儿具备社交理解能力的表现。
in an effort to 表示“试图；为了”，说明婴儿指物的目的。

sentences.sentence: Schatz studied the spontaneous speech of three-year-olds and found that these children used mental terms, and used them in circumstances where there was a contrast between, for example, not being sure where an object was located and finding it, or between pretending and reality.
sentences.translation: 沙茨研究了三岁儿童的自发言语，发现这些儿童会使用心理词汇，而且是在存在对比的情境下使用，比如在“不确定物体位置”与“找到物体”之间，或者在“假装”与“现实”之间。

structure.text: Schatz
studied the spontaneous speech of three-year-olds
and found that these children used mental terms, and used them in circumstances
that these children used mental terms, and used them in circumstances
where there was a contrast between, for example, not being sure where an object was located and finding it, or between pretending and reality

difficult_points: studied 和 found 是并列谓语，共用主语 Schatz。
that 引导宾语从句，说明发现的内容；从句中 used mental terms 和 used them 并列。
where 引导定语从句，修饰 circumstances，说明使用心理词汇的具体情境是存在对比的时候。

expressions.text: a contrast between A and B

sentences.sentence: Thus the social abilities of children indicate that they are aware of the difference between mental states and external reality at ages younger than four.
sentences.translation: 由此可见，儿童的社会能力表明，他们在四岁之前就已经意识到心理状态与外部现实之间的区别。

structure.text: the social abilities of children
indicate
that they are aware of the difference between mental states and external reality at ages younger than four

difficult_points: Thus 承接上文的证据，得出总结性结论。
that 引导宾语从句，作 indicate 的宾语。
at ages younger than four 修饰整个从句，说明这种意识出现在四岁之前。

expressions.text: the difference between A and B

sentences.sentence: A different explanation has been put forward by Harris.
sentences.translation: 哈里斯提出了另一种不同的解释。

structure.text: A different explanation
has been put forward by Harris

difficult_points: has been put forward 是被动语态，强调这一解释是由 Harris 提出的。
A different explanation 中的 different 与前文提到的其他几种解释（如 Leslie 的解耦器理论）形成对照。

sentences.sentence: He proposed that children use'simulation'.
sentences.translation: 他提出，儿童使用的是一种“模拟”策略。

structure.text: He
proposed
that children use'simulation'

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，作 proposed 的宾语。
use'simulation' 中缺失空格是原文排版问题，simulation 指“模拟”这一策略。

sentences.sentence: This involves putting yourself in the other person's position, and then trying to predict what the other person would do.
sentences.translation: 这涉及设身处地站在他人的立场上，然后尝试预测对方会怎么做。

structure.text: This
involves putting yourself in the other person's position
and then trying to predict what the other person would do
what the other person would do

difficult_points: This 指代前一句提到的 simulation（模拟）策略。
putting yourself in... 和 trying to predict... 是并列的动名词短语，共同作 involves 的宾语。
what 引导宾语从句，作 predict 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: Thus success on false belief tasks can be explained by children trying to imagine what they would do if they were a character in the stories, rather than children being able to appreciate the beliefs of other people.
sentences.translation: 因此，儿童在错误信念任务上的成功，可以解释为他们在想象自己若是故事中的角色会怎么做，而不是他们真正能够理解他人的信念。

structure.text: success on false belief tasks
can be explained by children trying to imagine what they would do
if they were a character in the stories
rather than children being able to appreciate the beliefs of other people

difficult_points: by children trying to imagine... 是被动结构中的方式状语，说明成功通过测试的原因。
if they were... 是虚拟语气，假设儿童自己是故事中的角色。
rather than 对比两种解释：想象自己是角色，还是真正理解他人的信念。

sentences.sentence: Such thinking about situations that do not exist involves what is termed counterfactual reasoning.
sentences.translation: 这种对并不存在的情境进行思考的方式，涉及所谓的“反事实推理”。

structure.text: Such thinking about situations
that do not exist
involves
what is termed counterfactual reasoning

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句，修饰 situations，指并不真实存在的情境。
what is termed 意为“被称为……的东西”，作 involves 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: A different explanation has been put forward by Harris.
sentences.translation: 哈里斯提出了另一种不同的解释。

structure.text: A different explanation
has been put forward by Harris

difficult_points: has been put forward 是被动语态，强调这一解释是由 Harris 提出的。
A different explanation 中的 different 与前文提及的其他几种解释形成对照。
本段与 H 段内容相近，属于源文本身重复出现的段落。

sentences.sentence: He proposed that children use "simulation".
sentences.translation: 他提出，儿童使用的是一种“模拟”策略。

structure.text: He
proposed
that children use "simulation"

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，作 proposed 的宾语。
本段用双引号标出 simulation，与 H 段单引号且缺失空格的写法不同，但所指相同。

sentences.sentence: This involves putting yourself in the other person's position, and then trying to predict what the other person would do.
sentences.translation: 这涉及设身处地站在他人的立场上，然后尝试预测对方会怎么做。

structure.text: This
involves putting yourself in the other person's position
and then trying to predict what the other person would do
what the other person would do

difficult_points: This 指代前一句提到的 simulation（模拟）策略。
putting yourself in... 和 trying to predict... 是并列的动名词短语，共同作 involves 的宾语。
what 引导宾语从句，作 predict 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: Thus, success on false belief tasks can be explained by children trying to imagine what they would do if they were a character in the stories, rather than children being able to appreciate the beliefs of other people.
sentences.translation: 因此，儿童在错误信念任务上的成功，可以解释为他们在想象自己若是故事中的角色会怎么做，而不是他们真正能够理解他人的信念。

structure.text: success on false belief tasks
can be explained by children trying to imagine what they would do
if they were a character in the stories
rather than children being able to appreciate the beliefs of other people

difficult_points: 本句以 Thus, 开头并带逗号，与 H 段对应句 Thus success... 的无逗号写法略有不同，属于版本差异。
by children trying to imagine... 是被动结构中的方式状语，说明成功通过测试的原因。
rather than 对比两种解释：想象自己是角色，还是真正理解他人的信念。

sentences.sentence: Such thinking about situations that do not exist involves what is termed counterfactual reasoning.
sentences.translation: 这种对并不存在的情境进行思考的方式，涉及所谓的“反事实推理”。

structure.text: Such thinking about situations
that do not exist
involves
what is termed counterfactual reasoning

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句，修饰 situations，指并不真实存在的情境。
what is termed 意为“被称为……的东西”，作 involves 的宾语。
